chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ خَالَفَ الرَّمْيَ أَوْ زَادَ أَوْ نَقَصَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 175 – The one who pelts differently, or more, or less

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/150)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/150)
text: رَجُلٍ نَسِيَ رَمْيَ الْجِمَارِ يَوْمَ الثَّانِي فَبَدَأَ بِجَمْرَةِ الْعَقَبَةِ ثُمَّ الْوُسْطَى ثُمَّ الْأُولَى يُؤَخِّرُ مَا رَمَى بِمَا رَمَى وَ يَرْمِي الْجَمْرَةَ الْوُسْطَى ثُمَّ جَمْرَةَ الْعَقَبَةِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad and Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Ibn Raib, from Misma’a,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws regarding a man who forgot to pelt the Jamarah on the second day, so he began with the Al-Aqabah Jamarah, then ‘Al-Wusta’ the middle, then ‘Al-Ula’ the first one, (heasws said): ‘He should delay what he pelts with, and he should pelt Jamarah al-Wusta (the middle Jamarah), then the Al- Jamarah Al-Aqabah.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad and Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Mahbub from ibn Ri’ab from Misma’ who has said the following: “This is about a man who due to forgetfulness on the second day first throws pebbles on Jamarah al-‘Aqabah’ then al-Wusta’ then al-’Ula’, Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ’He must reverse it by throwing pebbles on Jamarah al-Wusta’ then on Jamarah al-‘Aqabah’.’”
